events.title: Heaven's Generosity
events.flavor: Senior Wei speaks: the heavens are generous today. All cultivators shall receive a boon.
events.description: All Qi gains are doubled for all cultivators.

events.title: Heaven's Open Gate
events.flavor: The barriers between realms have thinned. All cultivators may pass through freely.
events.description: All cultivators receive 3 free Breakthrough attempts, guaranteed to succeed with no Qi cost.
